events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Given cords across walkways, missing guardrails, an unattended open hole, blocked egress/extinguishers, and an improvised scaffold, the assessment is `fail` at `critical` risk — multiple overlapping fall, trip, and life-safety hazards requiring immediate stop-work and correction (cover/guardrail the hole, clear egress and extinguisher access, reroute cords, dismantle the improvised scaffold in favor of an engineered one per 1926 Subpart L, and re-inspect before resuming).
